creator: khwerz@gmail.com
text:
I tried to make install /usr/ports/shells/rc

it ended with this error

===>  Configuring for p5-Locale-libintl-1.33
env: /usr/local/bin/perl5.34.1: No such file or directory

this is because the current perl is perl5.34.3 not .34.1

pkg install -f perl5 fixed nothing.
